steps.title: Acquire the following antibodies for the Western blotting protocol:
steps.instruction: Acquire the following antibodies for the Western blotting protocol:

steps.title: Primary Antibody
steps.instruction: Primary Antibody: rabbit Na/K ATPase (Abcam Cat# ab167390, 1:5000)

steps.title: Primary Antibody
steps.instruction: Primary Antibody: Synaptophysin Rabbit mAb (ABClonal Cat#A19122, 1:5000)

steps.title: Primary Antibody
steps.instruction: Primary Antibody: VAMP2 Rabbit mAb (ABClonal Cat#A4235, 1:5000)

steps.title: Secondary Antibody
steps.instruction: Secondary Antibody: HRP Goat Anti-Rabbit IgG (H+L) (ABClonal Cat#AS014, 1:10000)

steps.title: Run the gel until the loading...
steps.instruction: Run the gel until the loading dye front runs off the ends of the gel.

steps.title: Measure protein concentration with Bradford Kit,...
steps.instruction: Measure protein concentration with Bradford Kit, dilute into 4x Laemmli buffer to bring final concentration to 1x, and load to a 4-20%Mini-PROTEAN TGX precast gel.

steps.title: Using a TurboBlot system, transfer gel onto a PVDF membrane
steps.instruction: Using a TurboBlot system, transfer gel onto a PVDF membrane.

steps.title: Block membrane in 5% milk for...
steps.instruction: Block membrane in 5% milk for 01:00:00 and wash with TBST

steps.title: Incubate with the primary antibody at...
steps.instruction: Incubate with the primary antibody at the appropriate concentration listed above Overnight at 4 °C

steps.title: Incubate with the secondary antibody at...
steps.instruction: Incubate with the secondary antibody at the concentration listed above for 01:00:00 and wash with TBST

steps.title: Add HRP and detect chemiluminescence using an ImageQuant system
steps.instruction: Add HRP and detect chemiluminescence using an ImageQuant system.
